feed.title: Rakib Islam
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Sequence to Sequence Models
entry.content:
One of the major contribution of Deep Neural Networks is to model a sequence to another sequence. Here sequence could be a sentence in one language English. Neural Machine Translation (NMT) showed promising results.

Here are some links to learn more about a seq2seq models.

  • ICML 2017 Tutorial
  • [Tensorflow Tutorial] (https://www.tensorflow.org/tutorials/seq2seq)
  • Papers
entry.summary: One of the major contribution of Deep Neural Networks is to model a sequence to another sequence. Here sequence could be a sentence in one language English. Neural Machine Translation (NMT) showed promising results.

entry.title: Backpropagation explanation
entry.content:
This slide and hand note seems really easy to read.

  • Slides
  • handout
entry.summary: This slide and hand note seems really easy to read. Slides handout

entry.title: Tmux
entry.content:
Well this is after quite a while. Today I came to know about tmux which is splitting windows into multiple windows. For running experiments and following up them it will really help. Earlier I tried to create multiple tabs to follow up them. But now it’s quite easy to follow from a single window. This is a nice tutorial for starting with tmux

http://www.hamvocke.com/blog/a-quick-and-easy-guide-to-tmux/
entry.summary: Well this is after quite a while. Today I came to know about tmux which is splitting windows into multiple windows. For running experiments and following up them it will really help. Earlier I tried to create multiple tabs to follow up them. But now it’s quite easy to follow from a single window. This is a nice tutorial for starting with tmux

entry.title: Bash
entry.content:
Well I use them most of the times. So, just accumulation of them can save time. Read the nth line from a file

sed -n ‘26p’ log-hh101-timed.txt

How to zip a folder? zip -r file_name.zip directory

here directory is the location of all the files which we want to zip. and -r is the recursive option.

How to copy from remote server to current server?

scp is the command.

scp username@source-server-name:/which files to copy username@destination-server-name:/directory to copy

Drop All the submitted jobs Loop to drop the jobs

for i in `seq 546965 546985`; do qdel $i; done
entry.summary: Well I use them most of the times. So, just accumulation of them can save time. Read the nth line from a file

entry.title: RL Resources
entry.content:
This is to track the resources for RL. Some of them are from Andrej Karpathy blog

  • David Silver Course Video
  • Sutton’s Book
  • John Schulmann’s lectures
entry.summary: This is to track the resources for RL. Some of them are from Andrej Karpathy blog
